---
name: Feedback
about: Share ideas, suggestions, or general feedback
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ranystephan
---

**What's on your mind?**
Describe your idea, suggestion, or general feedback.

**Is this related to a specific feature?**
e.g. editor, terminal, sidebar, browser, notebooks, etc.

**How would this improve your workflow?**
Help us understand the impact.

**Screenshots or examples**
If applicable, add visuals or references to similar features in other tools.
